item.name: CRUD Lifecycle
item.description: One-click CRUD lifecycle: Login -> Create Account -> Create Policy -> Get Policy -> Update Policy -> Verify Update -> Delete Policy -> Verify Deletion

item.name: Policies
item.description: CRUD operations for the Policy entity. Run Create Policy first to set created_policy_id, then the rest.

item.name: Update Policy (full)
item.description: Replaces all policy fields via PATCH. PUT is also supported (tested separately).

item.name: Update Policy (partial)
item.description: Updates only the status field to cancelled via PATCH.

item.name: Update Policy (PUT)
item.description: Attempts PUT per task requirements. API supports PUT and returns 200.

item.name: Accounts
item.description: Additional read and cleanup operations for the Account entity.

item.name: Delete Account
item.description: Deletes the account created earlier. Runs last - after Delete Policy - so no dependent policies remain.

item.name: Negative Scenarios
item.description: Negative test scenarios covering missing fields, invalid data types, auth errors, non-existent resources, and malformed inputs. Each request targets one specific failure case.
